copyright_note: Internal reference only. Never served to end users.

items.passage: We know from drawings that have been preserved in caves for over 10,000 years that early humans performed dances as a group activity. We might think that prehistoric people concentrated only on basic survival. However, it is clear from the record that dancing was important to them.
items.first_sentence: We know from drawings that have been preserved in caves for over 10,000 years that early humans performed dances as a group activity.
